revision.comment: Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:会津坂下町]] [[commons:Category:Aizubange, Fukushima]] [[ko:Category:아이즈반게정]] [[zh:Category:會津坂下町]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:会津坂下町の歴史]].

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
link to category on commons now from wikidata
Text replacement - "[[Category:Recent overwrite wikipedia pages]]" to "[[Category:Recent overwrite wikipedia pages]][[Category:Tier_1_Categories_with_enwiki]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
Text replacement - "[[en:Category:Category:" to "[[en:Category:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:Category:Category:" to "[[ja:Category:"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9564634)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Portal|Japan}} {{Cat main|Aizubange, Fukushima}} {{Commons category}} {{wikidata link|Q9564634}} <!--interwikis--> [[co:commons:Category:Category:Aizubange, Fukushima]] [[en:Category:Aizubange, Fukushima]] [[ja:Category:会津坂下町]] [[ko:Category:분류:아이즈반게정]] [[zh:Category:Category:會津坂下町]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Recent overwrite wikipedia pages]] [[Category:Tier_1_Categories_with_enwiki]] [[Category:Towns in Fukushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikipedia categories named after populated places in Japan]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Aizubange%2C_Fukushima here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
